zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Tyrwhitt於1479年出生在英國林可爾史爾凱特萊比時，她的父親Sir William Tyrwhitt24歲，母親Anne Constable25歲。她於大約1507年與Sir Thomas Burgh在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年在英國林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Tyrwhitt于1479年出生在英国林可爾史爾凱特萊比时，她的父亲Sir William Tyrwhitt24岁，母亲Anne Constable25岁。她于大约1507年与Sir Thomas Burgh在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年在英国林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrwhitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Trewhitt
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): habitational name from High and Low Trewhitt in Rothbury (Northumberland). The origin of the placename is uncertain. This name has sometimes been confused with   Trevett  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Tyrwhitt was born in 1479, in Kettleby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir William Tyrwhitt, was 24 and her mother, Anne Constable, was 25. She married Sir Thomas Burgh about 1507, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1535, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Tyrwhitt est née en 1479, à Kettleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Tyrwhitt, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Constable, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Burgh environ 1507, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1535, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

Sie hat um 1507 in Lincolnshire, England Sir Thomas Burgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1535 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England.

ko.of Saltfleetby, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 살트플릿비 스트 클레멘트
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Tyrwhitt(이)가 1479년 영국 링코실르 케틀레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Tyrwhitt(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Constable(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1507년 영국 링코실르에서 Sir Thomas Burgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 영국 링코실르 게인스버루에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.of Saltfleetby, Lincolnshire, England: Saltfleetby St Clement, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Tyrwhitt nasceu em 1479, em Kettleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Tyrwhitt, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Constable, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Burgh aproximadamente 1507, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1535, em Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.of Saltfleetby, Lincolnshire, England: салтфлитби ст клемент, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Tyrwhitt родилась в 1479 г. в местности кеттлеби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Tyrwhitt было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Constable, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Burgh около 1507 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1535 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Burgh aproximadamente 1507, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1535, en Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
